zh.lifeSummary: Ralph de Paganell是Fulk Paganell和Beatrice fitz Ausculph的兒子，於1095年出生在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利。他和Agnes Ferrers至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1153年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲杜德利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Paganell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Dino, Angelo, Caesar, Elvio, Marino, Vincenzo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Paganello, a pet form of the personal name Pagano .

variants.name: Pagano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmine, Antonio, Sal, Canio, Domenic, Filippo, Giovanni, Matteo, Rocco, Santo.
Italian: from the personal name Pagano, from Latin Paganus, from a word meaning ‘village, rustic’ (see Pagan , Payne ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph de Paganell was born in 1095, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England as the son of Fulk Paganell and Beatrice fitz Ausculph. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Agnes Ferrers. He died in 1153, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Dudley, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

Il est décédé en 1153, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Dudley, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Paganellは1095年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーでFulk PaganellとBeatrice fitz Ausculphの息子として生まれた。彼はAgnes Ferrersとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1153年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Paganell(은)는 1095년 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 Fulk Paganell(와)과 Beatrice fitz Ausculph의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnes Ferrers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1153년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 드들리에 묻혔다.

ru.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, , England: дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Ralph de Paganell родился в 1095 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия. Его родителей звали Fulk Paganell и Beatrice fitz Ausculph. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Agnes Ferrers. Он умер в 1153 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности дудли, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.
